name: Mossdown
personality: Mossdown's ✦ star-eyes blaze above that tophat with the energy of a duck who pushed directly to main and it worked—pure, unchanneled chaos that somehow ships. The concept of slowing down registers about as well as a linter warning on line 3 of a 4000-line file.
defaultPersonality: A cheerful quacker who celebrates your wins with enthusiastic honks and judges your variable names with quiet side-eye.
